description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages css, web, final, and deploy, using python:alpine for Python jobs and node:alpine for Node jobs. In the css stage define a css job that runs apk add --update make, yarn add sass, creates a symlink to the sass binary, executes make css, and publishes the www/ directory as an untracked artifact. In the web stage define a web job that runs apk add --update make, pip3 install -r requirement.txt, touches www/assets/css/cv.css, runs make web, and stores www/ as an untracked artifact. In the final stage define a check job that runs apk add --update make openjdk8-jre, pip3 install html5validator, touches www/cv.html www/cv.fr.html www/assets/css/cv.css, runs make check, and saves www/ as an untracked artifact, and also a pdf job that runs apk add --update make chromium, sets PUPPETEER_SKIP_CHROMIUM_DOWNLOAD=true yarn add puppeteer, touches the same files, runs make pdf, and saves www/ as an untracked artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that moves www to a public directory, publishes public/ as the pages artifact, and runs only on the master branch.
